pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Spring Boot parent version to a release compatible with Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.4.x does not support Java 17; upgrading to 2.6.x is required to compile and run on JDK 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property to 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must target JDK 17 to utilize its features and ensure compatibility with the new Spring Boot parent.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Set the Spring MVC path matching strategy to ANT_PATH_MATCHER to resolve deprecation warnings and prepare for removal of the default PathPatternParser in newer Spring Boot versions.
src/main/resources/application.propertie.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x (which requires Java 17+) removes the ANT_PATH_MATCHER as the default and may throw errors or warnings if not explicitly configured when using certain libraries or legacy patterns.
